description: Recto: geomantic designs consisting of series of horizontal dashes organised in groups of 4 lines each and laid out in two columns. At the end of the second column there are four lines in Ladino mentioning a Sabbatical year. Verso: jottings, including the name Abram. Information from CUDL.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בLadino. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
